title: agrostis poluninii var. longiflora
intro: Agrostis poluninii var. longiflora is a type of grass, also known as a wild grass, native to specific regions. It is used in traditional medicine for its potential anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Agrostis poluninii var. longiflora include its ability to aid in wound healing and reduce fever, as well as its potential to improve respiratory issues such as bronchitis. Agrostis poluninii var. longiflora can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, although its availability and usage may vary due to limited research and information.
